name: julien-skills
description: Julien's personal Claude Code skill collection — NVC coaching, slide review, and logo design.

skills.name: nvc-coach
skills.description: Non-Violent Communication coach. Describe a situation, reformulate a message with empathy, or reflect on a past interaction. Based on Marshall Rosenberg's NVC framework.

user.claude: npx skills add jlengrand/my-skills --skill nvc-coach -a claude

skills.name: impactful-slides
skills.description: McKinsey-style slide coach. Share a deck or slide titles to get a structured review: titles-only test, 7 principles, mental model assessment, bridge analysis, and priority rewrites.

user.claude: npx skills add jlengrand/my-skills --skill impactful-slides -a claude

skills.name: logo-designer
skills.description: Create professional SVG logos from descriptions and design specifications. Generates multiple logo variations with different layouts, styles, and concepts.

user.claude: npx skills add jlengrand/my-skills --skill logo-designer -a claude
